title: sphaerochloa quinquangularis
intro: Sphaerochloa quinquangularis, a species of grass native to tropical Africa, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sphaerochloa quinquangularis include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil to utilize its medicinal properties.
